name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident 63df4501-8e43-4309-b236-bed7a7440e29
description:
Okay, here’s an analysis of the security alert, following your guidelines:

1.  **SUMMARY:** An unauthorized attacker exploited a Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) connection to gain access to a compromised system.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_USER & ISOLATE_HOST immediately.  Investigate the RDP connection and user associated with the source IP to determine the scope of the attack.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
